workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.label: Add Workspace
workspace.desc: Workspace is a space for grouping your company

error.min_length: Workspace name must be at least 3 characters.
error.format: Workspace name can only contain letters, numbers, periods, and commas.
error.duplicate: This workspace name is already registered. Please use a different name.

info.max_length: Workspace name must be no more than 60 characters.

company.title: Company
company.label: Company Data
company.desc: Complete company data as the foundation for GroApp integration.

company_name.label: Company Name
company_name.placeholder: Example: PT Kreasi Anak Bangsa / Haji Udin Store

error.min_length: Company name must be at least 3 characters.
error.format: Company name can only contain letters, numbers, periods, and commas.
error.duplicate: This company name is already used in this workspace. Please use a different name to keep your data organized.

info.max_length: Company name must be no more than 60 characters.

business_unit.title: Business Unit
business_unit.label: Business Unit Data
business_unit.desc: Optional - If you don't have a Business Unit yet, you can skip this step and you can add a Business Unit later.

error.min_length: Business unit name must be at least 3 characters.
error.format: Business unit name can only contain letters, numbers, periods, and commas.

info.max_length: Business unit name must be no more than 60 characters.

welcome.page_content: Here, you can manage your entire business identity in a more organized way-from Workspace, Company, to Business Unit.

structure.page_title: Get to Know Your Workspace Structure
structure.page_content:
Here's a quick overview of each level:
Workspace
The main container for organizing your business
Company
The business context that enables GroApp modules
Business Unit
The operational entity (branch, outlet, factory)

start.page_content: We'll guide you through setting up your first Workspace, Company, and Business Unit in just a few steps.

page_content.intro:
Data Preview
Please review your data before saving.

info.note: You can add more Companies and Business Units after completing the onboarding process

success.page_content: Your Workspace, Company, and Business Unit have been successfully created. You can now start using them.

error.title: Failed to Load Workspaces
error.description: Something went wrong while loading workspace data. Please try again.

not_found.title: Workspace Not Found
not_found.description: No workspaces match your search criteria.

empty.title: No Workspaces Yet
empty.description: You don't have any workspaces yet. Create your first workspace to get started.
